isolation.sharedState: none — tests are pure functions on in-memory buffers

VAL-XFORM-001.notes: Test `identity_transform_pixel_identical` in scene_render.rs: renders a scene with no transform and with identity transform, asserts byte-for-byte framebuffer equality (buf1 == buf2). Directly verifies contract: identity transform produces unchanged output.

VAL-XFORM-002.notes: Test `translate_shifts_content` in scene_render.rs: applies translate(10,5) to child at (10,10), verifies original position (15,15) shows background (r==0) and translated position (25,20) shows red (r==255). Directly verifies contract: integer translation shifts content, original position shows background.

VAL-XFORM-003.notes: Two tests: (1) `affine_transform_aabb_90_rotation` in scene.rs verifies AABB of 40x20 rotated 90° is ~20x40 (width~20±1, height~40±1). (2) `rotation_90_aabb_clip` in scene_render.rs renders a 40x20 node at (30,30) rotated 90°, verifies content is visible (not fully clipped) in the expected AABB region. Together they verify contract: 90° rotation swaps bounding box dimensions.

VAL-XFORM-004.notes: Test `affine_transform_rotate_180` in scene.rs: verifies rotation matrix coefficients — a≈-1, b≈0, c≈0, d≈-1 (cos/sin of 180°). Confirms 180° rotation is a point reflection. Contract specifies pixel(x,y)=input(w-1-x,h-1-y); the matrix test validates the transform produces the correct negation.

VAL-XFORM-005.notes: Test `scale_doubles_area` in scene_render.rs: 10x10 node with scale(2,2), verifies center pixel (20,20) of the scaled 20x20 area is green (g>200). Directly verifies contract: uniform scale 2x doubles the effective area.

VAL-XFORM-006.notes: Test `non_uniform_scale` in scene_render.rs: 10x10 node with scale(3,1), verifies pixel at (20,10) is blue (inside 30px wide region) and pixel at (36,10) is black (outside). Directly verifies contract: non-uniform scale produces 30x10 output from 10x10 input.

VAL-XFORM-007.notes: Two tests: (1) `child_transform_composes_with_parent` in scene_render.rs: parent translate(20,10) + child translate(5,3) → world position (25,13), verifies pixel at center (30,18) is red and origin (0,0) is not. (2) `affine_transform_compose_translations` in scene.rs: compose translate(100,50) with translate(10,5) → tx=110, ty=55. Directly verifies contract: child x parent transform composition.

VAL-XFORM-008.notes: Test `affine_transform_compose_three_levels` in scene.rs: three levels — translate(100,100) × scale(2,2) × translate(5,5). Point (0,0) → (5,5) → (10,10) → (110,110). Asserts transform_point returns (110,110). Directly verifies contract: deep nesting composes correctly via matrix multiplication.

VAL-XFORM-009.notes: Test `affine_transform_aabb_45_rotation` in scene.rs: 100x100 node rotated 45°, verifies AABB width≈141.42±1 and height≈141.42±1 (sqrt(2)*100). Directly verifies contract: 45° rotation AABB is ~141x141.

VAL-XFORM-010.notes: Test `clip_rect_intersected_with_transformed_aabb` in scene_render.rs: parent 50x50 with clips_children=true, child 40x40 at (25,25) rotated 45° (AABB ~57x57). Iterates all pixels outside parent bounds (x≥50 or y≥50), asserts r==0. Directly verifies contract: child clipped to parent bounds despite larger rotated AABB.

VAL-XFORM-011.notes: Two tests in scene.rs: (1) `affine_transform_skew_x` verifies skew matrix: a=1, d=1, c=tan(0.5), b=0. (2) `affine_transform_skew_x_parallelogram` verifies skew_x(atan(0.5)) transforms bottom-left (0,40) to (20,40) — bottom edge shifts 20px right. Directly verifies contract: skew produces parallelogram.

VAL-XFORM-018.notes: Two tests: (1) `affine_transform_scale_zero_no_panic` in scene.rs: scale(0,0) AABB returns w=0, h=0, no panic. (2) `scale_zero_no_output_no_panic` in scene_render.rs: renders scene with scale(0,0), verifies no panic and no red pixels anywhere (full 50x50 scan). Directly verifies contract: zero-area transform produces no output, no panic.

VAL-XFORM-019.notes: Test `affine_transform_negative_scale_mirror` in scene.rs: scale(-1,1) transforms point (10,5) to (-10,5). Verifies px≈-10 and py≈5. Directly verifies contract: negative scale produces horizontal mirror.

summary: Tested 13 assertions (VAL-XFORM-001 through VAL-XFORM-011, VAL-XFORM-018, VAL-XFORM-019): all 13 passed. Full test suite (1606 tests) passes with exit code 0. Each individual test was run in isolation via --test filter and confirmed passing. Test source was reviewed to confirm each test verifies the specific property claimed by the validation contract.
